channel.title: Hotel on Assembler Portfolio
channel.description: Recent content in Hotel on Assembler Portfolio

item.title: Hotel & Restaurant Spada Reale
item.description:
🍷 Overview

Official website of Spada Reale, a charming hotel and restaurant in the heart of Roaschia (Italy).

Built with Hugo, the project is fully customized, multilingual (Italian, English, French), responsive, and optimized for display on shopfront screens (night mode enabled).

It features dedicated sections for rooms, restaurant, local shop, regional products, and contact details — all presented with an elegant layout and streamlined navigation.

item.title: Hotel Moderno Demonte – Hotel Website
item.description:
🛠️ Overview

Development of the official website for Hotel Moderno Demonte, a mountain hotel located in the heart of Valle Stura (Northern Italy).

The goal of the project was to create a digital presence that feels:

  • welcoming
  • authentic
  • connected to the local territory

The website was built from scratch using Hugo, avoiding traditional CMS platforms in order to ensure:

  • fast loading times
  • a lightweight and stable structure
  • long-term maintainability
  • full control over the codebase

Special attention was given to:
